column10:
Ice cream is a sweet and cold desert enjoyed around the world. It is made by freezing and stirring cream at the same time. This mixes small amounts of air into the cream as bubbles, giving Ice cream a smooth and soft texture. Ice cream can be almost any flavor because other ingredients can be mixed in with the cream while it's being stirred. Some flavors you may have seen are chocolate, vanilla, mint, and straberry.
Frozen treats have been around for most of human history, but Ice Cream as we know it today was invented
